10590181.title: The Butterfly, the Harp and the Timepiece
10590181.description: A vagabond, an office worker and a former executive grasp for hope in their waning dreams through sentimental treasures at a magical pawn shop, but unlikely circumstances bind their paths together in a culmination of fulfilment and disappointment.
